channel.title: Electronics on Deal Ledger
channel.description: Recent content in Electronics on Deal Ledger

item.title: Corsair RM1000e Power Supply
item.description: 1000W fully modular ATX power supply for high-performance PC builds.

item.title: Anker MagSafe Charging Station
item.description: Foldable MagSafe-compatible stand for multi-device charging.

item.title: Noise-cancelling over-ears
item.description: Wireless Sony ANC headphones with long battery life.

item.title: soundcore Noise Cancelling Headphones
item.description: Adaptive ANC headphones with 50-hour battery life.

item.title: CORSAIR HS80 RGB Wireless Headset
item.description: Wireless Dolby Atmos headset for console and PC.

item.title: ELIVED Full-Motion TV Wall Bracket
item.description: Full-motion TV wall bracket for 14-42 inch screens.

item.title: Compact mechanical keyboard
item.description: Full-size RGB keyboard with media controls.

item.title: Anker Magnetic Wireless Power Bank
item.description: Magnetic 5,000mAh power bank for iPhone top-ups.

item.title: ULTIMEA Soundbar with Subwoofer
item.description: 5.1 soundbar system with subwoofer and rear speakers.

item.title: Anker Qi Wireless Charging Pad
item.description: Qi charging pad for desk and bedside phone charging.
